titleStmt.title: SII 10.346: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 346. (A.R. No. 176 of 1905.) ON THE SAME WALL. Ś. 1177. (Rākshasa)

summary.p: States that Gaṇḍapeṇḍāru Gaṅgayya-Sāhiṇi made a gift of the village of Pūlacheṟuvu in Moṭṭavāḍi to god Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva for the merit of Gaṇapatidēva-Mahārāja. States further that Gaṅgayya-Sāhiṇi was a Kāyastha by caste.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara bāhattariniyōgadhipati Anēkadēśādhipa tu ssamaya samuddharaṇa paścimarāyadāmōdarasainyadhiśāpaṭṭa Ēkāṁgavi
ra vīrāvatāra Ativiṣamahayārūḍha prauḍharēkhārēvaṁta vijayalakṣmīkāṁttanāyaka nārāyaṇa kāyasthakulakamalamā¨rttaṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍadōsta
ṁbhastaṁbhitasakalakṣitipālaśau¨ryyayaśastōmastilakitadigaṁganāmukha vitaraṇavini¨rjita kāmadhēnukalpadruma praṇatanarapatimaṇimakuṭakōṭimakarikācu
ṁbyamānacaraṇanakhakiraṇakaṁdaḷa kākatikulatilaka gaṇapatidēvamahārājacaraṇanaḷinayugaḷa samārādhanatatpara maṁḍalikabrahmarākṣasa gaṁḍape
ṁḍāru gaṁgayyasāhiṇi svasti śrīśubhaśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1177 Agu nēṁṭi rākṣasasaṁva tsara śrāvaṇaśuddha 15 maṁgaḷavāramunāṁḍu sōma
grahaṇanimittamuna gaṇapatidēvamahārājunakuṁ tamaku nabhyudayaparaṁpara gāvalayu nani śrītripurāṁtaka śrīmahādēvarakuṁ dama
saṁdhya Aṁgaraṁgabhōgālaku moṭṭavāḍilōni pulaceṟvu AneḍiŪru catussīmamuṁ saka lāyasahitamugānu Ācaṁdratārā¨rkkasthāyigā
dhārāpū¨rvakamu śēśi Icce . Īdha¨rmmuvuna kevvarēni laṁghanamu talaṁcinavāru galigirēni gaṁgātīramunaṁdu kapilagōvadha śēśina pāpānaṁ bōyi
tamapeddakoḍukukapālamuna śatrugēhamunaṁddu bhikṣānakuṁ bōyi cīṁpuṟukaṭṭanāṭuvaḍi mahāpātakānaṁ baḍuvāru . svadattāṁ para
dattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . śivamantu sa¨rvvajagatiḥ parahitaniratā bhavaṁtu bhūtagaṇāḥ
dōṣāḥ prayāṁttu nāśaṁ sa¨rvvatra sukhī bhavatu lōkaḥ . maṁgaḷamahā śrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 10.346 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
